work.name: Northwestern University
highlights: Center for Sustainable Separation of Metals

awards.title: IIN Future Faculty Program
awards.summary: Selected as part of the 2024-25 cohort of IIN Future Faculty Fellows

awards.title: IIN Postdoctoral Fellowsip
awards.summary: Prize postdoctoral fellowship awarded by the International Institute for Nanotechnology

awards.title: Anders Gustaf Ekeberg Tantalum Prize
awards.summary: Awarded to the lead author(s) of the published paper, book or patent that is judged by an independent panel of experts to have made the greatest contribution to understanding the processing, properties or applications of tantalum

awards.title: Mentorship Award
awards.awarder: NSF - Center for Sustainable Separation of Metals
awards.summary: Awarded for demonstration of exemplary mentorship

awards.title: Sustainability Ambassador Award
awards.awarder: NSF - Center for Sustainable Separation of Metals
awards.summary: Awarded for considering and promoting sustainability in research and leading sustainability outreach efforts in the community

awards.title: Young Scientist | 69th Lindau Nobel Laureate Meeting (Physics)
awards.awarder: Council for Lindau Nobel Laureate Meetings
awards.summary: Among the group of students & early career scientists selected from 88 countries to attend the 69th Lindau Nobel Laureate Meeting

awards.title: INSPIRE Fellowship
awards.awarder: Department of Science and Technology, Government of India
awards.summary: 5-year fellowship awarded by the Department of Science & Technology (DST), Govt. of India to students standing 1st in the order of merit in a STEM Program at selected Universities/ Institutes in India

awards.title: Junior Research Fellowship
awards.awarder: Council of Scientific and Industrial Research, Government of India
awards.summary: 5-year fellowship awarded by the Council of Scientific & Industrial Research (CSIR), Govt. of India, to students scoring > 99 percentile in the National Eligibility Test (NET) for pursuing PhD in Physical Sciences

awards.title: University Gold Medal
awards.summary: Awarded by Jadavpur University to the student standing first in the order of merit
